startPoint.en: Talk to an examiner in the Exam Centre in the Archaeology Campus.
startPoint.es: Habla con un examinador en el Exam Centre en el Archaeology Campus.

items.name: Cup of tea
items.display: Cup of tea (can be obtained during quest)

items.name: Rope
items.display: 2 ropes (can be pick-pocketed from the Dig Site workmen)

items.name: Uncut opal
items.display: Uncut/cut opal (an uncut version can be acquired during the quest)

recommended.name: Archaeology journal
recommended.display: An Archaeology journal from the Archaeology Guild to teleport to the Varrock Dig Site

rewards.name: Specimen cleaning
rewards.display: Ability to do specimen cleaning in Varrock Museum to obtain Kudos and a clean necklace

rewards.name: Terry Balando
rewards.display: Talk to Terry Balando with either 75 Magic, 75 Ranged, or 91 Constitution to obtain the Codex Ultimatus, which when read, unlocks 3 ancient abilities:

children.name: Shadow Tendrils
children.display: Shadow Tendrils - An enhanced ability requiring 75 Ranged

children.name: Smoke Tendrils
children.display: Smoke Tendrils - An enhanced ability requiring 75 Magic

children.name: Ice Asylum
children.display: Ice Asylum - An ultimate ability requiring 91 Constitution

rewards.name: Marfet
rewards.display: Talk to Marfet or Torrcs on the 1st floor of Varrock Museum, who say you can re-obtain Teddy, by pickpocketing Katarina.

rewards.name: Historian Minas
rewards.display: Bring Seth Minas, located in the Archaeology Guild, the level 1, 2 and 3 certificates during or after the quest to receive a Fruit Blast or a chocolate cake.

rewards.name: Frozen key
rewards.display: Ability to assemble the frozen key

text.en: 1 backpack space
text.es: 1 espacio de inventario

text.en: Speak to an examiner in the Exam Centre.
text.es: Habla con un examinador en el Exam Centre.

chatOptions: Accept

text.en: Teleport to the Archaeology Campus by using the archaeology journal and run south-east.
text.es: Teletranspórtate al Archaeology Campus usando el archaeology journal y corre hacia el sureste.

text.en: Talk to Seth Minas (site manager) in Archaeology Guild. Make sure you have the unstamped letter otherwise the dialogue with Seth does not progress.
text.es: Habla con Seth Minas (site manager) en Archaeology Guild. Asegúrate de tener la unstamped letter, de lo contrario el diálogo con Seth no avanzará.

chatOptions: 1 The Dig Site quest.

text.en: Grab a cup of tea from the desk in the south side of the building. It is behind Acting Guildmaster Reiniger or Drew (depends on your progress). Not required if you have one.
text.es: Coge una taza de té del escritorio en el lado sur del edificio. Está detrás de Acting Guildmaster Reiniger o Drew (dependiendo de tu progreso). No es necesario si ya tienes una.

text.en: Talk to an examiner in the Exam Centre; you will fail the exam.
text.es: Habla con un examinador en el Exam Centre; suspenderás el examen.

chatOptions: Any
Any
Any

text.en: Cup of tea
text.es: Cup of tea

text.en: Search the green bushes to the west of the Monolith in the middle of the Archaeology Campus (not the ones to the south, near the fences) until you find a teddy bear.
text.es: Busca en los arbustos verdes al oeste del Monolith en el centro del Archaeology Campus (no los que están al sur, cerca de las vallas) hasta que encuentres un teddy bear.

text.en: Take the panning tray from the small building south of the screening station.
text.es: Coge la panning tray del pequeño edificio al sur de la screening station.

text.en: Pan the water to the east of where you found the panning tray. Someone will try to stop you. Give him the cup of tea to pan the water.
text.es: Cierne el agua al este de donde encontraste la panning tray. Alguien intentará detenerte. Dale la taza de té para poder cerner el agua.

chatOptions: 2 So how do I become invited then?

text.en: Pan until you find a special cup.
text.es: Cierne hasta que encuentres una special cup.

text.en: Pan until you find an uncut opal if you have not already.
text.es: Cierne hasta que encuentres un uncut opal si aún no lo tienes.

text.en: Pickpocket the Dig Site workman in the north-east corner of the dig site until you get an animal skull.
text.es: Roba al Dig Site workman en la esquina noreste del dig site hasta que consigas un animal skull.

text.en: Talk to Katarina (student) in the central area of the dig site.
text.es: Habla con Katarina (student) en la zona central del dig site.

text.en: Talk to her again.
text.es: Habla con ella de nuevo.

text.en: Run south-east, talk to Dorian (student).
text.es: Corre hacia el sureste, habla con Dorian (student).

text.en: Talk to him again.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo.

text.en: Run west, talk to Eduardo (student) who can be found in the dig spot closest to the well.
text.es: Corre hacia el oeste, habla con Eduardo (student), a quien encontrarás en el punto de excavación más cercano al pozo.

text.en: Talk to him again.
text.es: Habla con él de nuevo.

text.en: Opal
text.es: Opal

text.en: Return to an examiner.
text.es: Vuelve con un examinador.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I certainly am.
1 The study of the earth, its contents and history.
3 All that have passed the appropriate Earth Sciences exam.
2 Proper tools must be used.

text.en: Talk to all 3 students again.
text.es: Habla con los 3 estudiantes de nuevo.

text.en: Return to an examiner.
text.es: Vuelve con un examinador.

chatOptions: 1 I am ready for the next exam.
3 Samples taken in rough form; kept only in sealed containers.
1 Finds must be carefully handled.
2 Always handle with care; strike cleanly on its cleaving point.

text.en: Talk to all 3 students again.
text.es: Habla con los 3 estudiantes de nuevo.

text.en: Katarina will demand an opal (talk to her again). You can obtain this by panning.
text.es: Katarina te pedirá un opal (habla con ella de nuevo). Puedes conseguirlo cerniendo.

text.en: Return to an examiner.
text.es: Vuelve con un examinador.

chatOptions: 1 I am ready for the last exam...
1 Samples cleaned, and carried only in specimen jars.
1 Brush carefully and slowly using short strokes.
3 Handle bones very carefully and keep them away from other samples.

text.en: Optional: Give Seth Minas (site manager) the level 1, 2 and 3 certificates to receive a Fruit Blast or a chocolate cake. The Fruit Blast can be saved for the quest Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest.
text.es: Opcional: Dale a Seth Minas (site manager) los certificados de nivel 1, 2 y 3 para recibir un Fruit Blast o un chocolate cake. El Fruit Blast se puede guardar para la misión Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest.

highlightTerms: Recipe for Disaster: Another Cook's Quest

text.en: 2 ropes (or pickpocket Dig Site workman until you get enough), specimen jar, specimen brush
text.es: 2 ropes (o roba al Dig Site workman hasta conseguir suficientes), specimen jar, specimen brush

steps.filename: The Dig Site - Digging for the talisman.png
steps.caption: Digging for the [[ancient talisman

text.en: Excavate the area on the ground named level 3 grid (near Dorian at the east digsite, see image) until you find an ancient talisman. It may take over 40 attempts to get it.
text.es: Excava la zona en el suelo llamada level 3 grid (cerca de Dorian en el dig site del este, ver imagen) hasta que encuentres un ancient talisman. Puede que necesites más de 40 intentos para conseguirlo.

text.en: Talk to Terry Balando back at the Exam Centre.
text.es: Habla con Terry Balando de vuelta en el Exam Centre.

text.en: Go to the north-eastern winch (a square hole in the ground with a rope going down it), at a dig site north from Dorian. You will also find Elissa wandering nearby and a training grid near the winch.
text.es: Ve al winch del noreste (un agujero cuadrado en el suelo con una cuerda que baja por él), en un dig site al norte de Dorian. También encontrarás a Elissa deambulando cerca y una training grid junto al winch.

text.en: Operate the winch three times to hand in your invitation, attach a rope, and climb down.
text.es: Acciona el winch tres veces para entregar tu invitación, atar una cuerda y bajar.

text.en: Pick up an arcenia root. One is directly to the east of the rope and another is west of the rope, under a torch on the wall. You may use Area Loot to pick them up.
text.es: Recoge una arcenia root. Una está justo al este de la cuerda y otra al oeste de la cuerda, bajo una antorcha en la pared. Puedes usar Area Loot para recogerlas.

text.en: Search the bricks south-east of the rope.
text.es: Busca en los ladrillos al sureste de la cuerda.

chatOptions: Any

text.en: Climb back up, then climb down the winch near Katarina to the southwest.
text.es: Sube de nuevo, luego baja por el winch cerca de Katarina, al suroeste.

text.en: Talk to Doug Deeping to receive a chest key.
text.es: Habla con Doug Deeping para recibir una chest key.

chatOptions: 4 How could I move a large pile of rocks?

text.en: Chest key, vial, trowel
text.es: Chest key, vial, trowel

text.en: Optional: Search the sack for an extra charcoal. Do not grind it. You will need it for Desert Treasure, but cannot get it from here after completing the quest.
text.es: Opcional: Busca en el saco un charcoal extra. No lo muelas. Lo necesitarás para Desert Treasure, pero no podrás conseguirlo aquí después de completar la misión.

text.en: Go back to the northeastern winch and climb down, use the key to unlock the chest in the north east room and search it for ammonium nitrate.
text.es: Vuelve al winch del noreste y baja, usa la llave para abrir el chest en la sala del noreste y regístralo para conseguir ammonium nitrate.

text.en: Use the trowel on the closed barrel directly east of the chest.
text.es: Usa la trowel en el barril cerrado directamente al este del chest.

text.en: Use a vial on the barrel.
text.es: Usa un vial en el barril.

text.en: Grind the charcoal.
text.es: Muele el charcoal.

text.en: If you didn't bring charcoal, search the sack of charcoal a few steps north.
text.es: Si no trajiste charcoal, busca en el saco de charcoal unos pasos al norte.

text.en: Mix the nitroglycerine and ammonium nitrate together, add ground charcoal, then finally add the arcenia root.
text.es: Mezcla la nitroglycerine y el ammonium nitrate juntos, añade el charcoal molido, y finalmente añade la arcenia root.

text.en: Search the bricks to the south and select the compound on the brick.
text.es: Busca en los ladrillos al sur y selecciona el compuesto en el ladrillo.

text.en: Search the brick again, select your tinderbox.
text.es: Busca en el ladrillo de nuevo, selecciona tu tinderbox.

text.en: Enter the large chamber, take the stone tablet.
text.es: Entra en la gran cámara, coge la stone tablet.

text.en: Stone tablet
text.es: Stone tablet

text.en: Use the tablet on Terry Balando in the Exam Centre.
text.es: Usa la tablet en Terry Balando en el Exam Centre.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
